text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Uhyaaaagh! What the?! Whoa, whoa, whoa—what
was that?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
H-huh? I feel kinda... hot. Like I'm overflowing
with power...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
YEEEAAH! I'm gonna dash all the way back to the
dorms!
